---
format-links: false
format:
  pptx:
    slide-level: 2
---

# Legacy Quarto Stub

This file is retained only as a historical pointer. It is not the active presentation source.

The active workflow is the native PowerPoint builder:

```powershell
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\docs\presentation_2026\render_presentation.ps1
```

The current editable deck is:

`docs/presentation_2026/urban_heat_transfer_presentation.pptx`

## Current Slide Structure

1. Cross-City Urban Heat Hotspot Prediction
2. Research Question + Validation Design
3. Modeling Section: Logistic vs Random Forest
4. Results Side By Side
5. City-Level Signal Shifts Across Evaluation Designs
6. Held-Out Denver Map Example
7. Questions
